data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of the subtropical ridge, showers will ease off over southern China tomorrow, the weather will be generally fine and very hot in the following few days. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring showers and thunderstorms to Guangdong in the latter part of next week. Besides, the tropical cyclone now near Guam will move towards the seas east of the Philippines and intensify gradually in the next couple of days.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260620","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.
